events.title: Official Announcement
events.description: Activision officially reveals Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 with a cinematic announcement trailer.

events.title: Reveal Trailer
events.description: The full reveal trailer showcases MW4's campaign, next-gen visuals, and confirms returning characters.

events.title: Gameplay Reveal
events.description: First look at MW4 gameplay footage, showcasing the enhanced IW 9.0 engine and new movement mechanics.

events.title: Multiplayer Reveal Event
events.description: Full multiplayer reveal event with map walkthroughs, weapon system deep-dives, and content creator hands-on sessions.

events.title: Campaign Deep Dive
events.description: Extended look at the MW4 campaign with developer commentary, story details, and mission previews.

events.title: Early Access Beta (PlayStation)
events.description: PlayStation players get exclusive early access to the MW4 open beta weekend.

events.title: Open Beta (All Platforms)
events.description: Open beta weekend for all platforms including Xbox, PC, and PlayStation.

events.title: Pre-Load Available
events.description: Pre-load becomes available for all digital pre-order customers across all platforms.

events.title: 🚀 GLOBAL LAUNCH
events.description: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 launches worldwide on PlayStation, Xbox, and PC. Available day one on Game Pass.

events.title: Season 1 Content Drop
events.description: First major post-launch content update with new maps, weapons, operators, and Warzone integration.

events.title: Season 2 & Ranked Play
events.description: Season 2 launch with ranked play mode, new battle pass, and competitive playlist updates.
